page.title: AI Assistant
page.subtitle: Ask questions about your finances in natural language

chat.notConfiguredBefore: No AI provider is configured. To use the AI Assistant, please
chat.enterHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

suggested.heading: Ask about your finances
suggested.intro: I can answer questions about your spending, income, account balances, net worth, and more.

monthlySpending.label: Monthly spending
monthlySpending.query: How much did I spend last month?

topCategories.label: Top categories
topCategories.query: What are my top 5 expense categories this year?

accountBalances.label: Account balances
accountBalances.query: What are my current account balances?

compareMonths.label: Compare months
compareMonths.query: Compare my spending this month vs last month

netWorthTrend.label: Net worth trend
netWorthTrend.query: Show my net worth trend for the last 12 months

savingsRate.label: Savings rate
savingsRate.query: How much have I saved this year compared to my income?
